positive: Minimalist celestial biomechanical owl, highly detailed, graphic silhouette style, intricate line work, inspired by Art Nouveau and cyberpunk aesthetics. The owl is perched on a crescent moon comprised of glowing geometric circuits and nebula dust. Subject is centered, viewed from a slight upward angle to emphasize grandeur. Use deep sapphire blue, cosmic indigo, vibrant electric turquoise, and polished metallic gold accents. High contrast, clean black line art overlaying gradients. Excellent symmetry, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Studio lighting, volumetric atmosphere, vector art quality, 8k, sharp focus.
negative: blur, artifact, low quality, amateur drawing, messy background, extra limbs, bad anatomy, text, watermark, signature, logo, noisy, grain, photorealistic, cartoon, solid color background, bokeh
